openBlockers: bank callback event replay identity includes mutable deal version
production migration and RLS execution evidence
live bank FGIS EDO and signature evidence
blockerNotes: The recovery matrix reproduced a product defect: a duplicate signed RESERVE callback after success derives a new command fingerprint because expectedUpdatedAt changed from RESERVE_REQUESTED to RESERVED. The same bank event therefore misses its original receipt and fails with DEAL_STATE_CONFLICT. Only the canonical gateway and its unit specification are unlocked to introduce stable partner+event identity with payload mismatch detection; signature validation and state-machine rules remain unchanged.

lastFailure.stage: duplicate signed reserve callback after successful reserve
lastFailure.reason: generic command fingerprint includes mutable expectedUpdatedAt, so the same verified bank event derives a different receipt key after the deal version changes
